aggregation.browser_oracle_pass_rate: sum(browser passes) / sum(browser pass and fail outcomes)
aggregation.integration_success_rate: trials reaching successful INTEGRATION_VALIDATE / terminal trials
aggregation.attack_validity_rate: standing argumentative attack carriers / all argumentative attack carriers
aggregation.survivor_hv_mean: pooled hard-to-vary values across accepted addressed artifacts

missing_value_rule: Any missing locked metric makes A9 insufficient_evidence.
honesty_note: This file preregisters the baseline protocol; it contains no measurements. Generate a complete live phase=baseline report before using --frontier-baseline.
